inputs.summary: Source-independent queue reports 0 Codex-executable tasks, 2 owner actions and public-ready 0.
KosmoReferences and KosmoAsset lanes pass review-only sweeps; owner decisions remain open.
Public gate passed with 81 public entries, 5 public models and no warnings.
No active worker sessions detected at the sampled time.
Mechanical watch shows recent file activity in KosmoDesign, KosmoPublish and KosmoVis.
KosmoDesign owns product surfaces and review gates; cross-repo writes are not allowed without explicit notice.
KosmoDraw is a mature engine lane now consolidated under KosmoDesign; remaining priority is the external capability atlas.
KosmoVis reports STOP-capability completion and requests TKB IFC re-materialization from the Publish lane.
Codex acts as technical integrator and owns KosmoReferences/KosmoAsset review-only scaffolding.

findings.summary: The source-free queue remains at 0 executable Codex tasks; fallback work should stay in review-only integration, gates or public-safe UI/readability.
Source-root selection and open owner review batches remain the only unlock path for private inventory or public-ready promotion.
KosmoVis can proceed to real TKB render QA only after KosmoPublish re-materializes the fixed geometry-bearing IFC.
KosmoDesign and KosmoDraw handoffs require Codex to consume contracts and write notices, not silently alter sibling lane code.
One read handoff contained sensitive operational literals; this sync intentionally does not repeat them.

recommended_next_actions.action: Keep source-independent queue and public gates stable; do not set public-ready or run private inventory.
Route the TKB re-materialization request to KosmoPublish if not already tracked in its current lane queue.
Treat KosmoDraw as the mature engine contract and focus new work on product surfaces, capability atlas and review gates.
Continue KosmoReferences/KosmoAsset review-only readiness work while owner source-root and rights decisions remain open.

hard_stops_preserved: No private PDFs, OCR text, scans, raw archive contents or worker logs were made public.
No private inventory or metadata worker was run.
No embeddings, fine-tunes, uploads, D1/R2 writes or public-ready promotions were performed.
No sensitive operational literals were propagated into this artifact.

completed.command: targeted rg scan for PII and operational literals
